Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Daniel K. Denenberg, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Yelena Nazur. Court hears evidence and grants compromise as prayed for in the petition. See imaged document.
